_comment: ArkAP plugin runtime config. Copy to ArkAP.config.json next to ArkAP.dll (the installer never overwrites an existing ArkAP.config.json).
_mode_help: ap = follow the Archipelago server (real multiworld). offline = self-randomize a local seed.json for solo hook testing.
_multiplayer_help: false = one shared AP slot for the whole server (solo - the default). true = PER-PLAYER slots: each survivor's engrams/tames/checks are their own AP slot. Each player needs their own yaml, and each connects with their own in-game /connect (or a connector instance pointed at ipc\<CharacterName>). See docs/GETTING_STARTED.md - Multiplayer.
_game_ini_help: Optional. Absolute path to the server's Game.ini for /confirm (randomize_dino_spawns). Blank = auto-derive (ShooterGame\Saved\Config\WindowsServer\Game.ini). Set this only if your Game.ini lives elsewhere.
